metadata.title: Daniel García Nilo - Computer Engineering, Software & Data Science
metadata.description: Professional portfolio of Daniel García Nilo, focused on software development, Data Science, artificial intelligence, backend and cloud.

hero.name: Daniel García Nilo
hero.title: Computer Engineering - Software, Data Science & AI
hero.bio: Computer Engineering student in continuous development, with experience in corporate solutions and a clear focus on software, data, AI and cloud. I enjoy building reliable, scalable and useful products.

about.title: Software, data and AI with a product mindset
paragraphs: I am Daniel García Nilo, a Computer Engineering student with a software engineering focus. From October 2024 to May 2026 I worked in the Architecture Department at Grupo Catalana Occident, contributing to corporate solutions related to processes, data and artificial intelligence.

My profile combines software development with a clear orientation toward Data Science, AI and cloud. During that experience I worked with C#/.NET, SQL, JavaScript, GAAN and JIRA, and since March 2026 I have been studying the Evolve Master's in Data Science / Artificial Intelligence.

I want to grow in demanding projects where code, architecture and data create real impact. My goal is to contribute from a solid foundation, learn quickly and build with technical judgment, communication and continuous improvement.

cards.title: Software Engineering
cards.desc: Maintainable solutions with focus on quality, business logic and product evolution.

cards.title: Backend & Data
cards.desc: Work with C#/.NET, SQL, validations, corporate processes and well-modeled data structures.

cards.title: Data Science & AI
cards.desc: Current training in Python, SQL, Power BI, advanced analytics, automation and applied AI.

cards.title: Cloud & Product
cards.desc: Interest in Firebase, Google Cloud, deployment, scalability and solutions with real impact.

skills.title: Technology stack
skills.intro: Technologies and tools I use in professional, academic and personal projects, focused on software, data, AI and cloud.

projects.title: What I have built
projects.intro: Software, data and AI projects that show my technical progression: from data analysis and machine learning to backend, cloud and conversational agents.
projects.noResults: No projects found with those filters.

expected-goals-xg-statsbomb.title: Expected Goals xG - StatsBomb
expected-goals-xg-statsbomb.description: Master-level notebook to build an Expected Goals model with StatsBomb Open Data, storytelling and advanced evaluation.

tfg-modulo-chatbots.title: Final Degree Project - Chatbots Module
tfg-modulo-chatbots.description: Final Degree Project focused on designing and developing a conversational agents/chatbots module.

find-it.title: FindIt
find-it.description: Serverless backend for a visual challenge game, validating object photos with Google Cloud Vision and Firebase.

lol-win-prediction.title: LoL Win Prediction
lol-win-prediction.description: Machine learning model to predict the winning team in League of Legends matches using real data.

futbol-data.title: FutbolData
futbol-data.description: Football data analysis and visualization scripts: heatmaps, passing networks, possession and player ratings.

tofu-awards.title: Tofu Awards
tofu-awards.description: Web application to manage and vote awards, deployed with Firebase Hosting and CI/CD using GitHub Actions.

unimate.title: UNImate
unimate.description: Collaborative academic project to help students organize work and connect with each other.

timeline.title: Professional and academic path
timeline.intro: A clear line between real corporate experience, technical education and current specialization in Data Science and artificial intelligence.

items.title: Software Developer - Architecture Department
items.description: Development and improvement of the corporate IATeach module, a solution focused on AI for document and process management. Work on business logic with C#/.NET, SQL integration, GAAN interfaces and JavaScript validations in an agile environment with JIRA.

items.title: Evolve Master's - Data Science / Artificial Intelligence
items.description: Evolve Master's program oriented to real professional environments. Specialization in Python, SQL, Power BI, advanced data analysis, automation and data-driven decision making.

items.title: Computer Engineering - Software Engineering focus
items.description: Comprehensive training in software engineering, databases, algorithms, systems, web development and team projects. Final project focused on conversational agents and generative AI.

items.title: Personal and academic projects
items.description: Development of personal projects in Python, data analysis, web applications and cloud. Practical focus on continuous learning, documentation and useful solutions.
